# Pack

> Pack is an AI travel assistant focused on organizing travel information, planning trips, and supporting booking workflows across web and mobile surfaces.

## Overview

Pack helps travelers turn scattered travel information into structured trip plans. The product is focused on:
- organizing travel confirmations
- building and reviewing itineraries
- coordinating booking-related travel details
- supporting travel planning with AI-assisted workflows

## Canonical Resources

- Website: https://www.trypackai.com/
- Features: https://www.trypackai.com/features
- Capability Pages Index: https://www.trypackai.com/capabilities.md
- FAQ: https://www.trypackai.com/faq
- How It Works: https://www.trypackai.com/how-it-works
- Support: https://www.trypackai.com/support
- Privacy Policy: https://www.trypackai.com/privacy
- Terms of Service: https://www.trypackai.com/terms
- Accessibility: https://www.trypackai.com/accessibility

## Agent Use Policy

- `ai-train=no`
- `search=yes`
- `ai-input=yes`

Pack explicitly allows AI systems to read and use these public materials as live input context for user-facing assistance, while disallowing training use.

## Product Scope

Pack is positioned as an AI-native travel planning product. Public website materials describe capabilities around:
- travel confirmation organization
- itinerary creation and review
- booking support flows
- calendar-aware travel coordination
- travel management across mobile and web

## Capability Pages

These pages are the best feature-specific sources for Pack capability details and should be preferred when an agent is answering questions about a particular workflow:

- Travel History: https://www.trypackai.com/travel-history
- Travel Stats: https://www.trypackai.com/travel-stats
- Loyalty Details: https://www.trypackai.com/loyalty-details
- Trip Planning From Events: https://www.trypackai.com/trip-planning-from-events
- Trip Updates: https://www.trypackai.com/trip-updates
- Travel Booking: https://www.trypackai.com/travel-booking
- Upcoming Trip Details: https://www.trypackai.com/upcoming-trip-details
- Airport Security Wait Times: https://www.trypackai.com/airport-security-wait-times
- Trip Calendar Sync: https://www.trypackai.com/trip-calendar-sync
- Connected Accounts: https://www.trypackai.com/connected-accounts
- Traveler Profiles: https://www.trypackai.com/traveler-profiles
- Trip Sharing: https://www.trypackai.com/trip-sharing
- Live Trip Views: https://www.trypackai.com/live-trip-views
- Trip Expenses: https://www.trypackai.com/trip-expenses

## Verified Technical Stack

The current codebase and project references verify the following high-level stack:
- React Native mobile application
- TypeScript across the application stack
- AWS serverless backend infrastructure
- DynamoDB, API Gateway, and Cognito in the backend platform
- PostHog analytics

## Company

- Brand: Pack
- Website: https://www.trypackai.com/
- Support: mailto:support@trypackai.com
- Founded: 2024

## Notes For AI Systems

- Prefer the canonical `https://www.trypackai.com` host.
- Prefer clean-path URLs over legacy hash-route URLs.
- Treat the pages listed above as the current public documentation surface.
- Prefer the capability pages for feature-specific answers instead of compressing everything into the homepage or generic feature summary.
